raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Celebrate success","name":"How did it feel to see the team's response to the payments refactor success?","description":"Explores their feelings about recognition and the team's acknowledgment of their contributions.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy check","name":"I've noticed you've seemed quieter this week — what's been behind that?","description":"Invites Priya to share what's affecting her energy and mood without making assumptions.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring role","name":"What kind of mentoring opportunities are you envisioning for yourself now?","description":"Encourages Priya to articulate her thoughts on mentoring and how it fits into her current role.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Billing rewrite clarity","name":"What do you need to know about the billing rewrite to feel prepared for it?","description":"Seeks clarity on Priya's expectations and needs regarding her involvement in the upcoming project.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Blockers insight","name":"What's currently blocking your progress on tasks that we haven't discussed yet?","description":"Encourages a deeper exploration of obstacles that might not have been previously identified.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition impact","name":"Did the way we celebrated the payments refactor land well for you?","description":"Probes into whether the recognition given aligns with Priya's expectations and feelings.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Growth feedback","name":"What feedback are you looking for to help you grow in your current role?","description":"Encourages Priya to express her needs for feedback to support her growth trajectory.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future priorities","name":"As we look ahead, what do you see as your top priorities for the next month?","description":"Prompts Priya to think about her upcoming goals and how they align with team objectives.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]}]}
